Each thread contains logically grouped review comments made on the same code location during pull request reviews. The automated [Analyze CI Test Failures](.github/workflows/fix-test-failures.md) workflow uses this issue to skip known failures and avoid filing duplicate issues.\\n\\n## Known Failures\\n\\n_No known CI (playback) failures at this time._\\n\\n\\u0026gt; **Note:** This list only tracks failures from **CI pipelines** (`ci.yml`, playback mode). Live-test pipeline failures (`tests.yml`) are excluded — the workflow filters them out by check-run name.\\n\\n## Maintenance Guidelines\\n\\n- **Adding entries:** When a CI failure is confirmed to be a pre-existing infrastructure/service issue (not a code bug), add it here with the package name, test pattern, error summary, root cause, and a tracking issue link.\\n- **Removing entries:** When the underlying issue is fixed and CI is green again, remove the entry and close the corresponding tracking issue.\\n- **Format:** Each entry must include the **package name** (as it appears in check-run names) so the workflow can match it.\\n- **Review cadence:** Review this list monthly to check if any known failures have been resolved.\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/issues/37864\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"deyaaeldeen\",\"id\":6074665,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/deyaaeldeen\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/6074665?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"test-reliability\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":0,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":0},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-27T04:32:04Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-27T16:33:26Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
